findings.description: The code example in the varStatusName warning note is incomplete. The source shows a two-line example demonstrating both n:set and n:write usage, but the knowledge file omits the `<n:write name="rowCount" />` line, leaving the usage pattern incomplete.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `<n:set var="rowCount" value="${status.count}" />` followed by `<n:write name="rowCount" />`. Knowledge file note only contains the n:set line.
